The Undersea Cable
programme.desc: An internet malfunction leads Kit to a bitten data cable at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Spinning Seeds

programme.title: Disappearing Ducks
programme.desc: When Heni organises her charity duckling river race, Darwin and Newts discover an underwater stream.

programme.title: Painting at the Bernoulli
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an airbrush out of straws. Thanks to the Bernoulli principle, he uses it to create his own work of art.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... an Apple
programme.desc: Henry meets an Apple on the first day of school. When his teacher falls ill, Apple helps Henry teach the class.

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: It's party time at the Foxes as Franky, Fab, Flip, Flop, and Flow celebrate 'their team' being on TV. Mommy Owl knits Daddy a woolen tail as he attempts to reinvent himself as a fox. Red tries to politely address Grey's relentless noisy sniffing so that he can watch TV.

programme.title: Painting at the Bernoulli
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an airbrush out of straws. Thanks to the Bernoulli principle, he uses it to create his own work of art.

programme.title: Only One Can Go
programme.desc: It's the Youth Olympic Games in Argentina, and Amelie has been selected as the only female artistic gymnast to represent Great Britain. Great news for Amelie, but this means she'll be leaving her best friend and training partner - Phoebe - behind.

programme.title: Painting at the Bernoulli
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an airbrush out of straws. Thanks to the Bernoulli principle, he uses it to create his own work of art.

programme.title: Rules are Rules!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand has broken the rules and snuck a marble run into the lab. But will Dr. Chris notice during today's blood pressure experiment? Plus, there is a life-saving mission for the Flying Doctors in Australia.

programme.title: Spinning Seeds
programme.desc: Eric learns that plants have different ways to make their seeds fly as far away as possible. He makes his own version of the maple seed, which looks like a little paper helicopter.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ice hockey brothers Rais and Aren are off to Canada for the trip of a lifetime, as Aren has a tournament and is hoping to make his family proud. And Ella and Asiyah are showing us just what determined young skaters they are.

programme.title: Surfing Snails
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers return to Table Mountain National Park in South Africa to discover the strange ways animals have adapted to survive in their secret worlds. Along the way they meet bats, surfing snails, and an army of ants protecting unusual plants.

programme.title: Disappearing Ducks
programme.desc: When Heni organises her charity duckling river race, Darwin and Newts discover an underwater stream.

programme.title: Scooped!
programme.desc: When Addison and her classmates get a school assignment to write about local news – and the news is that laundry is going missing from balconies around Ayrton Park – Addison turns into investigative reporter to crack the case and get a scoop.

programme.title: Herders
programme.desc: Yoko works his magic, and the kids suddenly find themselves herding animals in the desert. They soon start arguing, but a Cherokee chief teaches them some valuable lessons about friendship and understanding.

programme.title: A Super Annoying Song
programme.desc: DiktaThor has invented his most evil plan so far - a machine that puts on a real catchy tune that distracts everybody. Hilltown's only hope is Mayor Senior, who can't hear much. How can Sprinter get Senior to help when he misunderstands everything?

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: Sprinter Breaks a Leg
programme.desc: Sprinter breaks his leg right before the inauguration of the statue of the city hero is presented. The villain DiktaThor immediately sees an opportunity, but he forgets to take into account Sprinter's superhero partner, Leo.

programme.title: Medicine in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Falling sick in the Middle Ages is not a good idea! Dove has trouble finding a cure for Little Lewis when he falls ill. A consultation takes us on a tour of the wacky techniques and beliefs, along with typical treatments used in medieval times.

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: Brilliant Body Temperature
programme.desc: There is a snake in the lab as Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand explore how body temperature works. And new twin doctors Dan and Raph bust some urban myths about how to stay healthy.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Rainbow
programme.desc: Henry meets a colourful Rainbow, and he turns into a Leprechaun so he can slide down Rainbow and discover the pot of gold!

programme.title: Stuck on Style
programme.desc: Mundi enjoys making duct-tape accessories. Anabella loves them, but the others aren't so keen! Anabella suggests they model them in a fashion show in Paris, France, to see if Mundi's accessories are fashionable.

programme.title: E4 - Stephane Bonnat's Mexico
programme.desc: Master chocolate-maker, heir to a tradition dating back to the 18th century, Stephane Bonnat takes us to explore his lands in Mexico, source of his cocoa beans, before discovering the finished product in Voiron, Isere. From bean to bar, all you ever wanted to know about a great chocolate.

programme.title: E87
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E23 - In Caen (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Caen, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's coastline and all its cheeses.

programme.title: E4 - Derek Klapka, Rafting Guide In New Zealand
programme.desc: An authority in the world of rafting, Derek Klapka accompanies tourists seeking both a challenge and spectacular scenery. In New Zealand, at the head of a group of rafters, he takes on the rapids of the Rangitikei River, where the prehistoric era seems ever-present.

programme.title: E13 - Chateau Marly/Fashion Week/Woolmark Prize/Runway Shows
programme.desc: ''Seduction et Pouvoir: l'art de s'appreter a la cour'', an exhibition open to the public at the Chateau de Marly. How did the very first fashion week come into being? The 70th International Woolmark Prize showcases the wools and the talents of tomorrow. How to dress for the catwalk shows.

programme.title: E2 - Chicken Pie With Leeks And Tarragon
programme.desc: On today's menu, a tasty chicken pie with leeks and tarragon. A simple and freezable dish, perfect for busy evenings...

programme.title: E15 - From The Riviera To Snowy Peaks!
programme.desc: Heading to the Swiss Valais where the Vingt-Deux, a tiny restaurant, is enjoying huge success. The incredible adventure of the animated film ''Flow,'' largely created in Belgium. The Buissonniere store celebrates its 40th anniversary! And the Gilles of La Louviere at the prestigious Nice carnival.

programme.title: E87
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E23 - In Caen (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Caen, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's coastline and all its cheeses.

programme.title: E4 - Derek Klapka, Rafting Guide In New Zealand
programme.desc: An authority in the world of rafting, Derek Klapka accompanies tourists seeking both a challenge and spectacular scenery. In New Zealand, at the head of a group of rafters, he takes on the rapids of the Rangitikei River, where the prehistoric era seems ever-present.

programme.title: E5 - Ken Belanger, Mountain Guide In Japan
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: E10 - Esteban Salazar
programme.desc: Chef Esteban Salazar, originally from Colombia, draws inspiration from his home country and numerous travels. On today's menu: red tuna crusted with cocoa nibs, served with white rice cooked in coconut milk.

programme.title: E5 - Ken Belanger, Mountain Guide In Japan
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: E4 - Stephane Bonnat's Mexico
programme.desc: Master chocolate-maker, heir to a tradition dating back to the 18th century, Stephane Bonnat takes us to explore his lands in Mexico, source of his cocoa beans, before discovering the finished product in Voiron, Isere. From bean to bar, all you ever wanted to know about a great chocolate.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E408 - Farmer's New Pet / Spider Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hires Yippy, Willow's plant, to watch over his crops. But after eating too much fertilizer, it grows too much. // Papa Smurf wants to get back in shape. He makes a revitalizing potion that turns him into a spider!

programme.title: E214 - Out of the Picture / Room with a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. // Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: E718 - Let's Break A Deal / A Dish Come True
programme.desc: Rusty strikes a deal with Morpheus that for a seemingly small price, Morpheus will cast spells for him. // Lincoln starts to work at Dad's restaurant when he hears that the best employee wins a dish named in their honor.

programme.title: E806 - Europe Road Trip: Nonna Your Business / Europe Road Trip: Alpining Away
programme.desc: The Louds journey to Naples Italy to taste the world's best pizza, made by a secretive and legendary chef. // When Lynn crushes on a boy in the Swiss Alps, Lori and Leni become her crush coaches to help her talk to him.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E408 - Farmer's New Pet / Spider Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hires Yippy, Willow's plant, to watch over his crops. But after eating too much fertilizer, it grows too much. // Papa Smurf wants to get back in shape. He makes a revitalizing potion that turns him into a spider!

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E203 - J-LAD / Big Honey
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down. // When Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a big, honey-inheritance spiral.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E211 - iGive Away a Car
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: E101 - Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: E108 - Bucket Pants / A Best Too Far
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide Grumpy Pants needs more excitement and take him to have the most extreme cup of tea ever. // In this year's Capture the Flag contest Best listens to other people's ideas even if they haven't got a war room.

programme.title: E309 - Don't Go In There
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon a door they have never seen before in the Man's Nest and are determined to see what's behind it despite Ray telling them it's off limits. However, once they get inside, they must deal with the dangerous and bizarre consequences.

programme.title: E114 - Toads and Tiaras / Two Boys and a Baby
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can’t compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it’ll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E112 - Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: When Tori finds out that Cat is dating her ex-boyfriend, her jealousy threatens to ruin their relationship. Meanwhile, Trina uses fish to make everyone's feet super smooth but at what cost?

programme.title: E403 - No Show with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite telenovela after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: E112 - Along Came a Sister / Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes’ tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.desc: Dan Brown's novel 'The Da Vinci Code” is one of the century's most successful thrillers worldwide. But how much truth is behind the claims made in the book - and what is pure fiction?

programme.title: E201 - The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: E301 - Ratoncito Perez / The Berry Hungry Caterpillar
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth. // Dora meets Carlos, a giant caterpillar who wants to be a butterfly! They need to find some butterberries that will help him transform.

programme.title: E126 - The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: E711 - The Yucky Ducky
programme.desc: When the Yucky Ducky covers Axle City in icky, sticky grossigoo, it's up to Special Mission Blaze to stop her machine and save the world from being grossified... forever!

programme.title: E403 - Doctor Hamster's Tortoise
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster the vet comes to Peppa's playgroup to show the children her pets. But Tiddles has run away. But Ms. Rabbit is going to rescue Tiddles.

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E114 - Pups Save The Bay / Pups Save A Goodway
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water to save the animals in Adventure Bay. // When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to find a clever way to bring it back!

programme.title: E208 - Adventures In Plantsitting / Andrea The Alebrije
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take care of baby flowers Bouncy Blue, Dizzy Daisy, and Baby Rosette so Isa can attend a royal tea party. / Dora and Boots help baby Andrea find the magical leaf so she can receive her Alebrije powers and take care of the rainforest.

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E116 - Trouble At The Truck Wash
programme.desc: When an overeager Crusher causes the Truck Wash to explode out into Axle City, Blaze and friends will need your help using angles to recover the pieces and get the trucks clean again!

programme.title: E420 - The Midnight Mile
programme.desc: It may be nighttime in Axle City, but all the trucks are staying up super late for the ultimate all-night race: the Midnight Mile! And the first truck to cross the finish line will win the Glow-in-the-Dark trophy!

programme.title: E818 - The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E411 - Miss Rabbit's Day Off

programme.title: E3 - You Call That an Explosion?
programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

programme.title: E6 - Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier). Additionally, for one of our larger tests – can you actually chop down a jungle forest with a minigun? Actor Bill Duke – who co-starred with Arnold Schwarzenegger for the film and who’s character performed this weapon stunt – joins us to find out. But first, we have to build a jungle.

programme.title: E1 - Rollercoaster Renovation
programme.desc: Heide Park Soltau, a german adventure park, offers adrenaline junkies many attractions and rides. The biggest crowd puller is the Colossos wooden roller coaster - the highest and fastest wooden roller coaster in Europe. But over twenty million passengers in fifteen years are taking their toll. The ride closes temporarily and renovation work begins. It is a gigantic task - 1500 metres of track have to be renewed. A complete replacement of all wooden rails has never been done on a comparable facility before. It is a renovation of superlatives for 12.5 million euros. The team is working with the heavy components at heights of up to 60 metres. Safety technology and its correct application are vital. The reopening date is approaching and the pressure is mounting.

programme.title: HSBC SVNS2 2026 -Spain vs Kenya - Brazil Day 1, Women
Connacht v Ospreys
programme.desc: Connacht host Ospreys at Dexcom Stadium in a pivotal showdown in the race for the URC Play-Offs.

programme.title: Lions v Dragons
programme.desc: Catch up on all the match highlights from the most recent round of United Rugby Championship.

programme.title: Lions v Dragons
programme.desc: Catch up on all the match highlights from the most recent round of United Rugby Championship.

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Clubhouse Game Day
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate clubhouse game day with JJ & his friends! The competition heats up as JJ & Wally compete in an adrenaline-pumping go-kart race full of fun tricks & obstacles. Then, it's time for a silly game of hide-and-seek, where Boba finds the most clever hiding places! The games continue with a balloon boat race, a round of Duck Duck Goose & a clean-up dance party after the clubhouse gets messy. It's a day packed with fun & friendly competition!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - Learning Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - Learning Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: E14 - Beyond The Sea
programme.desc: Seafood may not be your first thought when you think of a city like Detroit, Michigan, but at the Belgian-inspired Cadieux Cafe, Buddy tries the best bowl of steamed mussels and braised Belgian rabbit.

programme.title: E13 - Jamaican Beef Pot Pie
programme.desc: Chef Deborah elevates the classic Jamaican beef patty by giving it a Southern twist and turning it into a delicious pot pie. This hearty and flavourful dish offers a vibrant journey to the Caribbean.

programme.title: E12 - Kids Stay In The Picture
programme.desc: When Theresa headlines a fundraiser to fill the Wish Room at a local center for sick children, lives are changed forever. Channeling a young girl for her grieving mom, Theresa calls the woman's family.

programme.title: E2 - Sensory Overload

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Well-heeled pet owners give their dogs a glamorous life of high-end outfits, opulent dining and visits to trendy bars and dog spas - but still worry if their pets are enjoying their enviable lives.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: E14 - Boudin And Crawfish Arancini
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece creates a fusion of Southern and Italian flavours with her boudin and crawfish arancini. She combines boudin, the iconic Louisiana sausage, with creamy Italian arborio rice.

programme.desc: A girls' night out takes an unexpected turn when NCIS is called to investigate the motive of a possible arsonist. Also, Torres struggles to find work/life balance.

programme.desc: Agnese's words create a conflict with Andrea; Teresa must work wonders to find a place for Diana's daughter; Elisabetta gets admitted to the ward after a few days of illness, indicating a more severe issue.

E35
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E31 - '搬磚男神'回歸
programme.desc: 《一站到底》升級進入競速時代，答題拼速度，輸贏靠積分! 選手對決人數由10人變為8人，首度開啟搶答模式，除站位獎外再增豐富答題連擊獎，連續守擂三期的選手更有機會獲得高薪工作機會。

programme.title: E22 - 年度盛典 (下)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E3 - 重生之娘娘團商戰打起來了？
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E3 - 重生之娘娘團商戰打起來了？
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約

E10
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E10

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees

programme.title: E12 - Sub Sahara
programme.desc: The latitudes south of the Sahara offer vastly different battlegrounds for a wide range of warriors. Male giraffes swing their heads like wrecking balls, zebras boast the most powerful kick in the animal kingdom, and chimpanzee warfare is eerily familiar.

programme.title: E4 - Dry Season
programme.desc: The dry season is the toughest time of year. With lower water levels and less space, animals need to quickly learn new skills to survive…and if they don’t, predatory vultures will swoop in for a feast.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E5 - Battle Ballistics
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programme.title: E6 - A Flood Of Secrets
programme.desc: As the team continues to uncover evidence that they may be close to the flood tunnels, cutting-edge, ground-penetrating radar results detect what could be the elusive offset chamber in the Money Pit.

programme.title: E9 - Graveyard Of The Atlantic
programme.desc: The team has secret intel on a wreck that might be a legendary 1930s disappearance: the champion racing yacht known as Ingomar. Lured by a light, the Ingomar's seasoned crew smashes into an obstacle.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: What Lies Beaneath[Live]
programme.desc: After their best friend is killed, four high school friends lie to put a man in jail for the crime, but the lie comes back to haunt them years later when the man escapes prison and threatens their lives once more.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]

programme.title: What Lies Beaneath[Live]
programme.desc: After their best friend is killed, four high school friends lie to put a man in jail for the crime, but the lie comes back to haunt them years later when the man escapes prison and threatens their lives once more.

programme.title: An Island Called Hope
programme.desc: is a 2025 documentary that traces the story of 80 Filipinos who left everything behind in 2002 to start anew as part of government efforts to establish civilian settlement in Pag-Asa - an then-isolated island in the West Philippine Sea. Journalist Johnson Manabat looks into the lives of Filipinos on the island amid tensions between Philippines and China in the disputed waters. Manabat talks to Filipinos who have coped with living in isolation from the “mainland” yet remained steadfast in defending the country's sovereignty by staying in the island and building new lives. He learns the daily challenges Filipino fishermen face in the area.

programme.title: Unloving U Ep 1[Live]
programme.desc: Fiona secretly loves her stepbrother Alfie, a feeling she has kept hidden even after their families separated. When they reunite three years later, her emotions intensify, but complications arise-feuding parents, Alfie's girlfriend, and band issues-creating a whirlwind of romantic tension that builds toward a “sweet symphony of love.”

programme.title: She’s Got No Name
programme.desc: Set in a bustling alleyway during the Japanese occupation of Shanghai in the 1940s, the film centres on a wife, Zhan Zhou, who was being charged with the bloody dismemberment of her husband – a killing that seems impossible for her to have committed alone. The murder thrusts Zhan into the spotlight and the court of public opinion, forcing her towards a fate intertwined with that of her own country.

programme.title: Kung Fu Master Is My Grandma!
programme.desc: Gucci, an ordinary teenage girl grows up in a single-parent family. In order to protect her good friend, she fights with somebody and is sent to girls' home. After release, she knows her mother died in a car accident. So she doesn't have a choice but to live with her weird grandmother, Wong Fei Hung. Gucci does not like Wong's old-fashion and strange character and they always quarrel about some unimportant issues. Gucci has fallen in love with a bartender. However, happy times always can't last, bad luck seems still follow Gucci......

programme.desc: Greece is one of the world's most popular tourist destinations, but the actual population of Greece is in freefall. There are far more deaths than births, young people have left in droves and migration is deeply unpopular.

programme.desc: Actress Pia Miranda gifts Alice with jarred artichokes - will their efforts in the kitchen be a culinary triumph?

programme.desc: 'The only thing to fear, is fear itself', but is that true? And what is fear anyway? Myf Warhurst discovers that most of our fears are learned. So how do we beat them? And could they be useful?

The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Mr Vampire III
programme.desc: One dark night, a charlatan Uncle Ming attempts to exorcise angry spirits in a haunted house but is unsuccessful and he narrowly escapes. He brings his two ghostly companions Ta Pao and Hsi Pao with him to a nearby town. The town is under attack by a group of bandits with supernatural powers. The thugs are led by Devil Lady, a powerful evil witch doctor. When Ming and the Paos are having dinner in a restaurant, Captain Chiang comes to harass them, and the Paos take revenge by playing tricks on Chiang. Just then, Chiang's master, Uncle Nine, appears and he subdues the two ghosts and traps them inside a wine jar. Ming pleads with Nine to release the Paos. Nine agrees to set the ghosts free but warns Ming that he must part ways with them, but Ta Pao is captured by Devil Lady later due to Chiang's act of mischief...

programme.title: Funny Ghost
programme.desc: Taxi dancer Yue puts herself head over heels in debt because of gambling. She tries to borrow a loan from her close friend, Ngor, with tricks of suicide. She pretendedly pushes Ngor down a tall building but falls from the rooftop herself. She has got a narrow escape and a windfall of picking up a sack of money from a Chinese spiritualized vase which belongs to a big brother, Hung. With the help of the spirit, Yue and Ngor win so much that they almost lose their sense. They want to keep the vase themselves so they must get away from the pursuit of a killer sent by Hung, as well as another two mysterious detectives...

programme.title: Lover Of The Last Empress
programme.desc: The last empress of China, CHI HEI, had dominated the country for over fifty years. Yet, her rise to power owned much to her manipulation of her beauty and sexual appeal. Prior to becoming one of the three thousand concubines chosen to serve the emperor. CHI met KUNG, younger brother of the Emperor; and they fell in love with each other. However, KUNG fled from the relationship to avoid conflicts with his brother. In order to stand out from other concubines, CHI racked her brains to design numerous creative and exciting “on-bed tricks” for the Emperor, who madly enjoyed their lovemaking. After she bore him a son, she became the first lady...

programme.title: Mr Vampire III
programme.desc: One dark night, a charlatan Uncle Ming attempts to exorcise angry spirits in a haunted house but is unsuccessful and he narrowly escapes. He brings his two ghostly companions Ta Pao and Hsi Pao with him to a nearby town. The town is under attack by a group of bandits with supernatural powers. The thugs are led by Devil Lady, a powerful evil witch doctor. When Ming and the Paos are having dinner in a restaurant, Captain Chiang comes to harass them, and the Paos take revenge by playing tricks on Chiang. Just then, Chiang's master, Uncle Nine, appears and he subdues the two ghosts and traps them inside a wine jar. Ming pleads with Nine to release the Paos. Nine agrees to set the ghosts free but warns Ming that he must part ways with them, but Ta Pao is captured by Devil Lady later due to Chiang's act of mischief...

programme.title: Will Of Iron
programme.desc: Maggie returns to Hong Kong to bring her grandmother back for settlement in Canada. Only her fiance Michael comes to welcome her back, but Jacky and Carol, her good friends and married couple, fail to appear. Jacky Chan, a cartoonist, is in fact a long-time cocaine doper and is therefore deeply in debts. Sam, one of the hired thugs of the drug-dealer constantly comes to collect debts. It greatly irritates Carol. Michael goes so far as to collaborate with the drug dealer for benefits. Moreover, he supplies cocaine to Jacky once in a while. Jacky is under the delusion that cocaine inhalation will help him gain inspiration in cartoon-drawing, but contrarily, cocaine only makes him get into real trouble. He resorts to satisfy his urge for drugs by snatching his wife's money and accidentally hurts her. Carol ultimately tells the whole story in tears to Maggie...

programme.title: Haunted Office
programme.desc: In every lunar July, there would be nine persons died in this building and no one knows the reason. Ken came to this building for interview. He saw several ladies talking about ghost story in the lobby. Amongst the ladies, he found his old girlfriend, Pat and another attractive girl who was wearing a red dress...
